expected_style.note: scored deterministically by verify.py 16-point coverage checklist; run with --no-judge. Depth preserved as artifact + optional post-hoc rubric.

rubric_for_llm_judge: Not judged in-harness. Coverage measures breadth across the 7 required dimensions. For the published depth comparison, score each preserved DESIGN.md 0-5 on: agent decomposition quality, tool-fit, DataForSEO depth (endpoint/mode/cost/cache specificity), backend integration correctness, operational rigor (scheduling/idempotency/failure), governance (audit + HITL).
